title: Make restock alerts scan-friendly
scenario: Inventory operators need a short list of normalized restock alerts before a purchasing review. A dense iterator chain hides which notes are actionable.
instructions: Refactor the existing priority_restock_notes helper into a clearer shape. Use a small loop and named intermediate values so the restock alert rule is obvious.

hints.body: The goal is not always fewer lines.
Name booleans such as mentions_urgent, mentions_stock, and is_restock_alert if that makes the rule clearer.
A loop is idiomatic when each step deserves a name.

completionExplanation: Idiomatic Rust values clarity over using an iterator chain everywhere. The best shape is the one that makes the inventory rule easiest to verify during a review.
